title: Due Scheduling, Monotonic Clocks, Backoff, Jitter, and Pause Policy · Language Lens: Feed Go Due State
summary: A ticker polls every feed at one interval, wall-clock jumps duplicate work, failures retry in lockstep, successful publishers never adapt, and paused sources remain due. Predict the reader decision, feed or API contract, Go and PostgreSQL ownership, bounded failure, and observable evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the feed go due state increment in deterministic adaptive polling scheduler. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, change…
objectives: Persist next attempt, last success, failure streak, publisher hints, pause state, and scheduling reason independently from process memory.
Reconcile fetched, admitted, inserted, updated, unchanged, rejected, quarantined, and committed counts exactly.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

steps.title: Feed aggregation and Go Predict Feed Go Due State · Theory Feed Go Due State
steps.instruction:
theory case — A theory Go team handles case 7236 during a publisher-fairness incident rehearsal. Build deterministic Go evidence to prove persisted due state, injected clocks, adaptive backoff, jitter, pause, and non-overlap; every goroutine, body, row set, transaction, lease, timer, and pool needs named cleanup ownership; then inject one URL, DNS, redirect, compression, entity, depth, timeout, or publisher-budget failure and reject it safely. Browser Go uses pure bounded models and original RSS, Atom, HTTP, PostgreSQL, and reader fixtures only. Real DNS, sockets, XML libraries, PostgreSQL, processes, signals, race, load, containers, accessibility review, backups, and production behavior require explicit controlled transfer gates.

checks.pattern: // Evidence: feed-go-due-state-16ey51(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?func\s+evidence_feed_go_due_state_16ey51\s*\([^)]*\)\s*\(bool,\s*int,\s*string\)\s*\{(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?scheduleCases < 8)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?dueCases < 3)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?jitterCases < 3)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?overlappingRuns > 0)(?=(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return)(?:(?!// Evidence:)[\s\S])*?return
checks.description: The increment includes the required executable or reviewable evidence structure.
checks.failureMessage: Complete the full function, prompt contract, or gate record shown in the brief.

checks.description: The evidence note explains the model, failure risk, and verification in the learner’s own words.
checks.failureMessage: Add a causal explanation using persist and next plus specific case evidence.
